summary: Comprehensive testing of AutoML Master 7-point validation fix. Most features working correctly. One critical bug found: Decision Tree visualization modal shows 'No tree available' because only the best model is stored, not all trained models.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'No decision tree data available' even when Decision Tree model was trained. Root cause: Only the best model is stored in the models array (line 1948-1954 in App.js). When best model is not decision_tree (e.g., Naive Bayes or SVM wins), the tree data is lost.

issues: Two 'churned' entries visible with different timestamps (12:23:59 PM and 12:25:38 PM) - may indicate deduplication not working for all edge cases

passed_tests: Login flow - email/password authentication works correctly
CSV file upload and data profiling - Customer Churn dataset loads (1000 rows x 15 cols)
Model training with Auto mode - trains 7 algorithms (Naive Bayes, SVM, Random Forest, Baseline, Decision Tree, KNN, Logistic Regression)
View Tree button visible on leaderboard for decision_tree and random_forest entries
Download CSV button works with success toast notification ('Download started: analysis_data_xxx.csv')
Share Analysis button creates shareable link with toast notification ('Share link copied to clipboard!')
Export to Google Sheets button works with loading/success feedback ('Download started: analysis_for_google_sheets_xxx.csv')
SHAP analysis runs successfully with plain-English explanation panel ('The model relies most heavily on senior_citizen and tenure_months...')
LIME analysis runs with plain-English explanation panel ('For this specific record, the model predicted 0.000 for churned...')
Backend fingerprint deduplication works (same fingerprint returns 'action: updated' instead of creating duplicate)
SmartTooltip viewport-aware positioning works - tooltips display correctly with metric explanations
Charts are properly sized (1498x350, 1498x300) and fully visible
Snapshot CRUD operations all pass (8/8 tests)
action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Decision Tree visualization - Store decision_tree and random_forest models separately when trained, even if not the best model. Currently only bestModelObj is stored (line 1938-1954 in App.js). Need to also store tree models for visualization.
INVESTIGATE: History deduplication - Two 'churned' entries appeared with different timestamps. May need to verify frontend fingerprint computation or debounce timing.
critical_code_review_comments: Line 1948-1954 in App.js: Only stores best model in models array. Decision tree data is lost when another algorithm wins.
getDecisionTreeModel (line 2413-2422) correctly looks for models with tree data, but the data is never stored if decision_tree isn't the best model.
Suggested fix: After training, also store decision_tree and random_forest models separately for visualization purposes, regardless of whether they're the best model.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Decision Tree modal not showing tree data)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user for authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: Decision Tree visualization is the main issue. The View Tree button appears correctly on the leaderboard, but clicking it shows 'No decision tree data available'. This is because the code only stores the best model (line 1948-1954). When training with Auto mode, if Naive Bayes or SVM wins, the decision tree model data is discarded. The fix requires storing tree-based models separately for visualization. All export features (CSV, Sheets, Share) work correctly with toast notifications. SHAP and LIME explanations work with plain-English panels. Backend fingerprint deduplication works correctly.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Decision Tree modal shows 'No tree available'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In handleTrain function (around line 1948-1954), only the best model is stored in the models state array. The decision tree model object (which contains the tree structure) is created during training but discarded if it's not the best performing model.
reproduction_steps: 8. Click 'View Tree' button on Decision Tree entry
9. Modal opens but shows 'No decision tree data available'
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Modify the training code to also store decision_tree and random_forest models in a separate state variable (e.g., treeModels) for visualization purposes, regardless of whether they're the best model.
